drl:
rule "R0"
salience 10
when
    T1(f0 >= 0.0, f0 != -4, $b0_0_0 : f0)
then
    insertLogical(new T2(false, 100, $b0_0_0));
end
rule "R1"
when
    ( T2(f1 != -1000000007 || f2 == -1.0) )
    or
    ( T2(f1 != -1000000007 || f2 == -1.0) )
    or
    ( T2(f2 not in (-1.0, 4.5, 3.0)) )
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    (or not T2() not T2())
then
    insertLogical(new T2(false, -3, 2.0));
end
rule "R3"
salience -7
when
    $p3_0 : T1(f0 < 1.0, f0 > -0.5, $b3_0_0 : f0)
    $p3_1 : T0($b3_1_0 : f3)
    T1(f0 <= $b3_0_0, $b3_2_0 : f0)
then
    insertLogical(new T2($b3_1_0, $p3_1.getF1(), $p3_0.getF0()));
end
name: fz_123_274
